title: Thoughts of Shinji after Kaworu death

Then I hated him for killing Kaworu. Since as you all know I love Kaworu

chunks.content:
Article: Thoughts of Shinji after Kaworu death
[]: Thoughts of Shinji after Kaworu death             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sun Nov 13, 2005 4:44 pm What did you think of Shinji after he killed Kaworu? -I know that I felt sad at first because of the 3 min suspence sequence before he killed him. Then I hated him for killing Kaworu. Since as you all know I love Kaworu

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Sun Nov 13, 2005 5:58 pm Lemme guess, this would be a thread inspired by a Evafreak/Shnooks arguement..? The only time I ever considdered Shinji a hero in the whole series is when i saw that head drop.

[]:             Quote Post by klanco » Sun Nov 13, 2005 6:38 pm "shit! the kaworu fans would hate me for this...and Asuka fans...they havent seen anything yet...."

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Nov 13, 2005 6:49 pm I though that it was screwed up that this kid tolded Shinji " I love you " then said " Kill me or I'll distry humanity " To this day I think its the most fucked up scene in the series. EoE was worse, but that was just betrayal, and I have a low tolerance for that.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Nov 13, 2005 7:37 pm Since I had more or less figured out Kaworu was an angel the moment he first turned around, his death really didn't come as that much of a shock. The Beethoven soundtrack was obviously portending gloom and doom as well. I didn't expect that Shinji was going to linger so long on his decision, given that he was livid only moments before. But then again, no one saw that one coming.

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Sun Nov 13, 2005 7:57 pm Dude. I don't understand you Kaworu fangirls. He was in half an episode. He died. Kaji was in half the series. Why doesn't anyone like Kaji? D; ...anyway, when I first saw that episode, I was upset 'cause I was going through a

Article: Thoughts of Shinji after Kaworu death
. He was in half an episode. He died. Kaji was in half the series. Why doesn't anyone like Kaji? D; ...anyway, when I first saw that episode, I was upset 'cause I was going through a yaoi phase and liked Shinji/Kaworu. But now when I see it, I giggle at Kaworu's head going 'pop!'. Kaworu's a cute character and all, but that scene just...amuses me now. o__o;;

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Nov 13, 2005 9:20 pm sachiel wrote: Dude. I don't understand you Kaworu fangirls. He was in half an episode. He died. Kaji was in half the series. Why doesn't anyone like Kaji? D; ...anyway, when I first saw that episode, I was upset 'cause I was going through a yaoi phase and liked Shinji/Kaworu. But now when I see it, I giggle at Kaworu's head going 'pop!'. Kaworu's a cute character and all, but that scene just...amuses me now. o__o;;

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Nov 13, 2005 11:52 pm Ok, so if you were in shinjis shoes at the moment before he popped his head, what would you have done? Kill him? Let him go? Or just stand there in awkward silence for awhile? Remember what happens if you let him go!

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Nov 14, 2005 12:32 am I'd have said somthing close to " Why did you say what you said, before. You take my painaway just to give me a choice like this! This is so much worse, and so curle. CAN YOU UNDERSTAND THAT?"
